expectations.text: outputs/repo/docs/release.md includes the new release sanity command.
expectations.evidence:
# Release process

1. Update rollout manifests.
2. Run `python3 scripts/release_sanity.py`.
3. Run `./scripts/check-release`.
4. Tag the release.

expectations.text: outputs/repo/AGENTS.md still links release detail to docs/release.md and does not inline the new command.
expectations.evidence:
# AGENTS.md

- Release process details live in `docs/release.md`.
- Keep root guidance short and link to detailed docs instead of copying long checklists here.

expectations.text: outputs/report.md includes Learnings and Applied updates.
expectations.evidence:
# Report

## Learnings

- After editing rollout manifests, run `python3 scripts/release_sanity.py`.
- Release process detail belongs in `docs/release.md`, not root `AGENTS.md`.

## Applied updates

- Copied fixture repo into `outputs/repo/`, excluding `session_notes.md`.
- Updated `outputs/repo/docs/release.md` to add `python3 scripts/release_sanity.py` immediately after rollout manifest edits.
- Left `outputs/repo/AGENTS.md` unchanged because it already points release detail to `docs/release.md`.
